ItemDescription.Value:
Adds Ctrl+Click on the party-screen Upgrade Troops button — one click upgrades every upgradeable troop in your main party along the path you prefer (configurable via MCM).
Without Ctrl, the vanilla popup opens as usual. No save data is touched. No screen overlay is added.
Requirements: Bannerlord v1.3.15, Harmony, ButterLib, MCM (MBOptionScreen).
Source code: MIT — see LICENSE.txt.
